problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to quantum, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
